title: Is there a way to have empty dates populate on the xaxis?
excerpt: In another program we are looking to move away from, you can plot a chart with a general timeline on the x-axis with the y-axis being counted items using a date column.  When I try to do the same in monday.com, I have ga…

posts.author: eolson (Evan Olson)
posts.cookedHtml:
In another program we are looking to move away from, you can plot a chart with a general timeline on the x-axis with the y-axis being counted items using a date column. When I try to do the same in monday.com, I have gaps between dates that aren’t shown, even when “show empty” is triggered. Is there a way to go about this without having to enter wrong information?
What I get:

Screenshot 2024-06-27 0854251039×412 9.34 KB

Versus what I want:

posts.author: greentoothbrush (ian ross)
posts.cookedHtml: The only way is to enter “zero” data points for the x values required.
